title: Own Your Power | Launch Campaign
summary: OUR STRATEGIC UNLOCK: MENTAL HEALTHWe discovered that vaping and recreational weed use is due to a growing mental health issue among teens.
body: The mental health crisis is driving an increase in risky behavior, and teens are increasingly turning to vaping and marijuana to cope. That’s why we created a campaign to give teens the tools and strategies to take control of their mental health and #OwnYourPower

We engaged teen creators to build the campaign using an inside out approach. We knew that if this were to be successful, it had to come from the teens themselves. Rather than spit facts and shame tactics, we offered solutions for bettering your mental health and have real conversations around vaping and weed.

“VIBES” MEETS ACTIONAs a veteran of the Truth campaign, I knew that if we were going to break through, we needed to create a brand that met teens where they are, one that feels authentic and inspiring. That’s why our creative team took inspiration from the themes of street fashion and TikTok to create a playful landscape that was designed to help teens take action and embrace healthier decisions.
Your affirmation for today? Give yourself grace and patience. You got this.
